allow: PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($proc\) { $p = Get-Process -Id $proc.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "PID $\($proc.OwningProcess\): $\($p.ProcessName\)"; Stop-Process -Id $proc.OwningProcess -Force; "Killed" } else { "Port 8000 is free" })
